info.title: Create :  -c  --create
info.description:
zip2 -cf NEW-ZIP [OPTION ..] FILE [FILE ..]
Extract:  -x  --extract
zip2 -xf ZIP-FILE [OPTION ..] [WILD ..]
List   :  -t  --list
zip2 -tf ZIP-FILE [OPTION ..] [WILD ..]
Version:  -V  --version
zip2 --version
For example:
Extract a zip to dir 'restoreToDir'
zip2 -xf ..\backup.zip -O restoreToDir
Store files, which timestamp is within 2 days, into a new zip file.
dir2 src\ -bsk --within 2day | zip2 -cf ..\new.zip -3T -
